# Acme Developer Platform

> The official documentation and API reference for the Acme automation toolkit.

This file serves as a map for AI assistants. All secondary reference URLs can be found in our comprehensive index.

## Getting Started
- [Quickstart Guide](https://example.com): Step-by-step instructions to initialize the SDK and authenticate your client.
- [Authentication](https://example.com): Explains JWT handling, scopes, and key rotation protocols.

## Core Concepts
- [Webhooks](https://example.com): Patterns and event payloads for building real-time data syncs.
- [Error Codes](https://example.com): Complete troubleshooting matrix for 4xx and 5xx network exceptions.
